findings.summary: the standing handoff still directed the operator to the @vilosource scope under pure OIDC — superseding handoff 5af9df8be1a0 records the rename, the NPM_TOKEN bootstrap + expiry, and the flip-before-publish order

RUNBOOK Mode D still claimed GitHub Packages publishing — corrected to public npmjs with first-publish-pending framing per ADR-0051; residual one-word heading staleness ('auth-gated') accepted as cosmetic

npm provenance is documented as requiring a public source repo (unverified offline) — publish dispatch is sequenced AFTER the visibility flip in the handoff, making the exact failure mode moot; rename completeness and the inverse GitHub-slug check verified exhaustively clean in round 1
